body_preview: Make the assessment phase reliably produce `session_plan/assessment.md` by restructuring the prompt so the file is created first, then populated — eliminating the "agent ran but didn't write the file" failure mode. Why this matters: Day 105's assessment agent ran with exit code 0 but did not write `session_plan/assessment.md`. The harness gracefully degraded
title: Harden assessment prompt to guarantee artifact is written
